Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I've gotten a lot of my edge back since I've been able to focus on my training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 1 25 25}I've been meaning to thank you for that. You've really stepped up as our leader.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}So tonight's on me. You've got enough responsibility as it is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Hahaha, you really are something else. I knew I had a good feeling about you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Really? I'd say you're doing great. As long as you make sure to get plenty of food and rest, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Heh, so you've got talent and an appetite. I think you'd make a pretty good athlete.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Just don't push yourself too hard. Things'll get easier with experience.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}And if you need anything, let me know. I'll do whatever I can to help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Ah, I knew it! You're Sanada-san, from Gekkoukan High![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}I heard you lived in Iwatodai, but wow, I never thought I'd run into you here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}We're big fans of yours! Please, can we get a picture with you!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}...I'm busy. A-And I don't like having my picture taken.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}I kept hearing rumors that you were injured. Are you okay now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Do you need any help? Is there anything I can bring you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1003}Ooh, who do you think that is?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1004}Not sure. A celebrity maybe? Wanna go see?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}...I've had this problem at school, but I didn't think it'd happen out here, too.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}It's probably because of those interviews, or the rumors online. I've gotten all kinds of attention as I've kept up my winning streak.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}You can say that again. I'm not some panda in a zoo for everyone to gawk at.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I've heard Junpei say that, but I wasn't expecting it from you, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}Well, I appreciate their support, but I don't have time for them right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}All I want is to be as strong as I can. I wanna train hard and feel real pride in my strength.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 3 25 25}...But all I ever seem to get is more trouble.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}All right, looks like they've given up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Let's head out to eat, for real this time. We only have so many hours left in the day.[n]{f 1 1}
